description: EduGap Code Bay app-level background assets. Use these as the outermost dashboard/page background behind major UI surfaces, not inside individual cards.
usageRules: Use WebP files in runtime UI; PNG files are source/reference copies.
Use as decorative background with alt="" and aria-hidden="true".
Place at the outer app/page shell level, behind all cards and panels.
Keep a light overlay above the image so dense text cards stay readable.
Do not place this image inside individual cards or content panels.

assets.title: Code Bay App Shell Background
assets.description: Soft Code Bay learning garden scene for the outer dashboard shell across app pages.

assets.title: Code Bay Profile Background
assets.description: Personal progress garden scene for the outer profile page shell.
